info.title: kobotoolbox — mocker seed-data schema
info.description: Schema for the seed data openfn-mocker needs to impersonate kobotoolbox. Derived from the adaptor's OpenAPI spec. A seed dump is { collection: { id: record } }; each record validates against its resource schema below.

SeedData.description: Full seed dump loaded by mocker: one property per collection.

assets.description: Records keyed by id for the assets collection.

assetMetadataResponses.description: Records keyed by id for the assetMetadataResponses collection.

dataBulkUpdateResponses.description: Records keyed by id for the dataBulkUpdateResponses collection.

dataResponses.description: Records keyed by id for the dataResponses collection.

dataValidationStatusUpdateResponses.description: Records keyed by id for the dataValidationStatusUpdateResponses collection.

deploymentResponses.description: Records keyed by id for the deploymentResponses collection.

owner__username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.

AssetTypeEnum.description:
* `text` - text
* `empty` - empty
* `question` - question
* `block` - block
* `survey` - survey
* `template` - template
* `collection` - collection

_supplementalDetails.description: Action-specific supplemental data attached to this submission. Structure varies by action type (transcription, translation, qual). Top-level keys are question XPaths, values are action objects.
_supplementalDetails.title: supplementaldetails

SupplementalDataAutomaticQual.description: Map of automatic question UUIDs to their action objects

SupplementalDataAutomaticTranslation.description: Map of language codes to automatic translation objects

SupplementalDataManualQual.description: Map of manual qualitative question UUIDs to their action objects

SupplementalDataManualTranslation.description: Map of language codes to manual translation objects
